species: Here, we report cryoEM structures of Pex1/Pex6 from Saccharomyces cerevisiae...
disease_state: Pex1/Pex6 mutations cause severe peroxisome associated developmental disorders.
sample_source: We co-expressed Pex1 WT and Pex6_WB in S. cerevisiae...
cell_line: We first introduced the E832Q mutation to the Walker B ATPase motif of the D2 domain of Pex6 from S. cerevisiae (Pex6_WB).
